name: Shenzhou IVA Suit
manufacturer: China Astronaut Research and Training Centre
best_known_for: Worn by every Chinese taikonaut on every Shenzhou flight since 2003
credit: Chinese launch-entry pressure suit derived from the Soviet Sokol family. Used on Shenzhou 5 (Yang Liwei, China's first crewed spaceflight, 2003) and every subsequent Shenzhou mission to date.
